folio.label: 58v
folio.l: The moder of the Soudan , riche and gay
Receyuetú hire , with al so glad a chere
As any moder mygút , hire dougúter deere
And to the next Citee , there beside
A softe paas , solempnely they ride
¢ Nougút trowe I , the triumphe of Iulius
Of whicú that lucan , maketú swicú a boost
Was reallere , or more curious
Than was the assemble , of this blisful oost
But this scorpion , this wykked gost
The Soudanesse , for al hire flaterynge
Cast vnder this , ful mortally to stynge
¢ The Soudan cometú hi~ selue , sone after æis
So really , that wonder is to telle
He welcometú hire , witúalle ioye & blisse
And thus in myrthe & ioye , I lat hem dwelle
The fruyt of this mater , is that I telle
Whan tyme come , men thou©t it for the best
That reuel stynt , and men gon to here rest
¢ The tyme come , this olde Soudanesse
Ordeyned had this fest , of whiche I tolde
And to the feest , cristenfolk hem dresse
In genäal , ©e bothe ©onge and olde
Here mounö men feest , and realte beholde
And deyntees moo , than I can ©ow deuyse
But al to dere , they bougút it er they ryse
¢ O sodeyn woo , that euäe art successour

note.notetxt: 323There is a cross in dry point in the left margin.ODR

folio.l: To worldly blisse , spreynde witú bitternesse
The ende of the ioye , of oure worldly labour
Woo , occupietú the fyn / of oure gladnesse
Herkene this counseil , for thy sekirnesse
Vp on thy glad day , haue in thy mynde
The vnwar woo , or harm , æ cometú behynde
¢ For shortly to tellen , at a word
The Soudan , & the céstene euerichone
Ben al to hewe , and stiked at the bord
But it were oonly , Dame Custaunce allone
This olde Soudanesse , cursed crone
Hatú witú hire frendes , doon this cursed dede
For she hire selue wolde / al the contree lede
¢ Ne was Surryen noon , that was conuerted
That of the counseil , of the Soudan woot
That he nas al to hewe , er he a sterted
And Custaunce han they take / a none foot hoot
And in a shippe , al steereles god woot´

note.notetxt: 341There is a cross in dry point in the left margin.ODR
